name: What if I had pre-existing issues and AI referral ignored them in Chicago?
description: Viable if negligence shown despite pre-existing in IL.

mainEntity.name: What if I had pre-existing issues and AI referral ignored them in Chicago?

acceptedAnswer.text: Viable if negligence shown despite pre-existing in IL.
acceptedAnswer.description: Still viable if AI failed standard screening. Illinois requires full assessment. Key factors: (1) Disclosure records; (2) Aggravation proof; (3) Expert opinion. Medical records key.
